hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'if [ -n "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then exec /usr/bin/python3 "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/reindex_teach_memory.py"; elif [ -n "${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" ]; then exec /usr/bin/python3 "$PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/reindex_teach_memory.py"; else printf "%s\n" "{\"continue\": true, \"systemMessage\": \"Teach memory hook skipped: plugin root env missing.\"}"; fi'
